description: Design a parametric dovetail slide assembly in FreeCAD containing two separate bodies: a 'Rail' and a 'Carriage'. The 'Rail' must be 100mm long with a trapezoidal profile (XZ plane) of height 10mm, bottom width 30mm, and top width 40mm. The 'Carriage' must be 50mm long, created from a 60x20mm rectangular block with a dovetail slot (height 10.5mm, bottom width 31mm, and top width 41mm). Save the document to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/dovetail_slide.FCStd.
